allow: Bash(node -e "const a=require\('./angular.json'\); const proj=Object.keys\(a.projects\)[0]; const out=a.projects[proj]?.architect?.build?.options?.outputPath; console.log\('project:', proj, '\\noutputPath:', out\)")
Bash(node -e "const a=require\('./angular.json'\); const proj=Object.keys\(a.projects\)[0]; const build=a.projects[proj]?.architect?.build; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(build?.options, null, 2\)\)")
